ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the object (post, comment, etc.) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Actual content (text, image, video, etc.) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was created */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the content type (post, comment, etc.) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who created the content */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent content item (for replies) */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (image, video, etc.) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the content has been edited */,
  "edited_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "content_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "is_commentable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the content type can be commented on */,
  "is_shareable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the content type can be shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user profile is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who created the post */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the post is published */,
  "publish_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who created the comment */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is approved */,
  "approved_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who created the reply */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the reply is approved */,
  "approved_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upvotes" (
  "upvote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upvote */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the content item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the upvote was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upvote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upvotes_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upvotes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the content item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flag was created */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the content item */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement metric (e.g. likes, comments, shares) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the moderator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the moderator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the moderator account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the moderator is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator action */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the content item */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the moderator */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the moderator (e.g. delete, edit, flag) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the category is default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the content item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the content item */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the content item */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g. mention, reply) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the session is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content history entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the content item */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action that occurred (e.g. edit, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_history_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the badge was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reputation" (
  "reputation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reputation entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reputation score was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reputation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reputation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the content item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_recommendations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
